PatternLayout.pattern: %d %notEmpty{#$${env:NOMAD_ALLOC_ID:--}}%notEmpty{@${env:NOMAD_ALLOC_INDEX:--}} [%t] %highlight{%-5level %logger{36} %notEmpty{- ID=%X{messageID} }- %msg %n}{ FATAL=red blink, ERROR=red, WARN=yellow, INFO=normal, DEBUG=green, TRACE=cyan}
%d %notEmpty{#$${env:NOMAD_ALLOC_ID:--}}%notEmpty{@${env:NOMAD_ALLOC_INDEX:--}} %highlight{%logger{36} - %msg%n}{ FATAL=red blink, ERROR=red, WARN=yellow, INFO=normal, DEBUG=green, TRACE=cyan}
